policy: New naming violations must not increase any count beyond this baseline. Reduce counts only after renames are complete and callers updated.

notes.N001: 4 remaining verbose `pub fn get_*` accessors after path.spl/platform.spl renames (get_container, get_registry, get_weaver, get_exit_code)
notes.N002: 6 paired dirs: fs+file_system, db+database, compress+compression (complementary, not duplicates — see lib_architecture.md §5)
notes.N003: 7 duplicate is_*/has_* predicate name+signature pairs across files (path.spl triplicated, platform.spl is_windows/unix/macos/linux duplicated in spec.spl)
notes.N004: 1 set_from_list constructor in src/lib/nogc_sync_mut/src/set.spl (should be from_list)
